introSection: Hilly-Billy-Race is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Tier- und Freizeitpark Thüle in Friesoythe-Thüle, Lower Saxony, Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.

fullText:
Hilly-Billy-Race is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Tier- und Freizeitpark Thüle in Friesoythe-Thüle, Lower Saxony, Germany.



Red track and yellow supports.

The car is designed to resemble a soapbox race car.


 * Hilly-Billy-Race on the park's website
